name: Matzo Brie (Fried Matzo)
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak matzos in cold water for 2 minutes. Drain and crumble.
2. Beat eggs and salt together in a bowl. Add matzo; mix until well-coated.
3. Heat butter in a skillet and pour in matzo. Fry until browned on both sides.
4. Serve warm with syrup and/or preserves.
Can find matzo (mahtzo) crackers in "gourmet" sections, or stores that cater toward kosher foods. I prefer the egg and onion flavor...
